bupt.ta.service

类 AdminService.MonitoringReport

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.AdminService.MonitoringReport
  • 封闭类:
    AdminService

    public static class AdminService.MonitoringReport
extends java.lang.Object
    Aggregated alerts for the admin monitoring dashboard.
